shellCommands.command: pwd && rg --files | sed -n '1,160p' && printf '\n--- zoom references ---\n' && rg -n "Zoom|zoom|maxZoom|supports|isImage" src test* . --glob '!node_modules' --glob '!dist' | sed -n '1,240p'
find . -maxdepth 3 -type f | sort | sed -n '1,220p'; printf '\n--- zoom references ---\n'; grep -RInE "Zoom|maxZoom|supports|isImage" src test tests 2>/dev/null | sed -n '1,280p'

sed -n '1,180p' src/plugins/zoom/index.ts; printf '
--- props ---
'; sed -n '1,140p' src/plugins/zoom/props.ts; printf '
--- Zoom ---
'; sed -n '1,120p' src/plugins/zoom/Zoom.tsx; printf '
--- wrapper ---
'; sed -n '1,180p' src/plugins/zoom/ZoomWrapper.tsx; printf '
--- image rect ---
'; sed -n '1,160p' src/plugins/zoom/hooks/useZoomImageRect.ts; printf '
--- controller ---
'; sed -n '1,130p' src/plugins/zoom/ZoomController.tsx; printf '
--- lightbox types ---
'; sed -n '1,220p' src/types.ts 2>/dev/null || true; printf '
--- zoom tests ---
'; sed -n '1,260p' test/unit/plugins/Zoom.spec.ts

sed -n '1,180p' src/plugins/zoom/hooks/useZoomState.ts; printf '
--- controller hook/types ---
'; sed -n '1,220p' src/modules/Controller/useController.tsx 2>/dev/null || find src/modules -type f -maxdepth 3 | sort | xargs grep -n "slideRect"; printf '
--- render slide props and carousel ---
'; grep -RIn "RenderSlideProps\|slideRect" src/types.ts src/modules src/components | sed -n '1,220p'; printf '
--- index exports ---
'; sed -n '1,180p' src/index.ts; printf '
--- package scripts ---
'; node -e "console.log(require('./package.json').scripts)"; printf '
--- test setup/utils ---
'; sed -n '1,240p' test/unit/test-utils.tsx 2>/dev/null || sed -n '1,240p' test/unit/test-utils.ts

sed -n '280,360p' src/types.ts; sed -n '1,105p' src/modules/Carousel.tsx; sed -n '1,115p' src/modules/Controller/Controller.tsx; sed -n '340,375p' src/modules/Controller/Controller.tsx; sed -n '1,170p' src/plugins/zoom/ResponsiveImage.tsx; sed -n '1,140p' src/utils.ts

grep -RIn "type.*Callback\|Callback<.*=>\|maxZoom" src/plugins src | sed -n '1,240p'; sed -n '1,130p' src/plugins/video/index.ts; sed -n '1,120p' src/plugins/thumbnails/index.ts; grep -RIn "interface SlideTypes\|type: \"video\"\|declare module.*types" src test/types docs | sed -n '1,200p'
